title: The Supreme Court blocks Trump’s firing of Lisa Cook, Comcast plans a company split, and Rafael Nadal eats anchovies for breakfast. Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:
A federal judge has permanently blocked the Trump administration from withholding funds from a $16 billion rail tunnel project that would connect New York and New Jersey under the Hudson River
A congressman who was absent from the Capitol for nearly four months disclosed that he had been diagnosed with depression in a floor speech on his first day back at work
NPR erroneously reports Samuel Alito is retiring, minutes after Supreme Court’s birthright citizenship ruling
Cape Verde will beat Argentina 1-0 in World Cup clash, predicts president
After U.S.-Iran War, Oman Is Said to Propose Strait of Hormuz Fee Plan
Wife of Ukrainian oligarch with ties to Russia loses her legs in terrorist bombing in Monaco — the first ever in the wealthy city-state
Andy Burnham, the UK’s Likely Next Prime Minister, Promises Shift of Power Out of London
Supreme Court rules states may ban trans athletes from girls' sports teams
Warsh Wants the Fed to Talk Less. That Only Gets Wall Street to Listen Harder.
